title: EL REVISION NOTES
content:
EL REVISION NOTES

does she not refuse her call to action?

Make the third act encounter with Julian sensual and tempting

Trim it down, make it sparse and fun and zippy to read (like ALIEN)

El often colored herself in yellow. She donned her school uniform, checking her socks in the mirror—she adjusts her collar and the school uniform transforms back into her own clothes.

El settled on a bus of frozen wax dummies. At first dazed, until one dummy comes alive and starts to twitch, grabbing El’s attention.
